layouts.container: w-full max-w-[390px] mx-auto bg-[#F4F1EC] py-4 flex flex-col gap-5 overflow-hidden
layouts.scroll_row: flex flex-nowrap items-center gap-2.5 overflow-x-auto px-4 w-full hide-scrollbar
layouts.chip: flex items-center justify-center gap-2 whitespace-nowrap rounded-full transition-all duration-300 ease-out cursor-pointer active:scale-95 select-none

visual_enhancers.action_chip_inactive: bg-transparent border border-[#0B0B0D]/20 text-[#0B0B0D] h-8 px-4
visual_enhancers.action_chip_active: bg-[#0B0B0D] border border-[#0B0B0D] text-[#F4F1EC] h-8 px-4
visual_enhancers.guest_chip_inactive: bg-white/60 border border-[#0B0B0D]/5 shadow-sm text-[#0B0B0D]/70 h-9 px-4
visual_enhancers.guest_chip_active: bg-[#0B0B0D] border border-[#0B0B0D] shadow-md text-[#E2C06E] h-9 px-4
visual_enhancers.vibe_chip_inactive: bg-transparent border border-[#0B0B0D]/15 text-[#0B0B0D]/80 h-9 px-4
visual_enhancers.vibe_chip_active: bg-[#0B0B0D] border border-[#0B0B0D] shadow-md text-[#D4B36A] h-9 px-4
visual_enhancers.scrollbar_hide: Add CSS to hide scrollbar globally or in a utility class: .hide-scrollbar::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; } .hide-scrollbar { -ms-overflow-style: none; scrollbar-width: none; }

motion.interaction: Scale down to 0.95 on active/press state (active:scale-95).

accessibility.touch_targets: Ensure minimum touch target size of 32px height (using h-8 or h-9).
accessibility.contrast: Gold text on Black background provides excellent contrast for active states.
accessibility.testing: MUST include data-testid on every interactive chip, e.g., data-testid='filter-guest-100'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Create a mobile-first filter component with 3 distinct scrollable rows matching the provided screenshots structure.
Row 1: Sort, Type, Filters (Use styling from action_labels and action_chip). Include icons like ArrowDownUp for Sort, SlidersHorizontal for Filters.
Row 2: Guest Count (e.g., 0-100, 101-250, 251-1000, 1001-2500). Use the Users icon. Apply metric_labels typography.

Row 3: Vibes/Moods (Royal, Modern, Garden, Poolside, Heritage, Intimate, Grand Ballroom). Use specific icons like Crown, Sparkles, TreePine, Waves, Landmark, Gem, Building2. Apply vibe_labels typography (Cormorant Garamond) for a luxury feel.
Implement the hide-scrollbar CSS class to ensure horizontal scrolling is clean and invisible without breaking the UI layout.
Use optical alignment for icons and text: Ensure flex items-center and gap-2 inside chips.
Add 'data-testid' to every chip to facilitate robust automated testing.
Manage the active state for chips locally in the component to demonstrate the active vs inactive visual design.
The file extension should be .js or .jsx, NOT .tsx as this is a JavaScript project.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight. Do NOT use standard SaaS blue active states. Respect the premium hospitality-tech aesthetic by strictly adhering to the black, warm white, and gold palette. Ensure generous padding in the scroll containers (px-4) so items don't feel cut off abruptly at the edges. Use subtle typography differences (sans vs serif, varying tracking) to establish clear hierarchy and luxury feel.
